cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.4)

project(teanet)

# set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} -g -O0")
# Generated by: ruby -e 'puts "0x%08x"%rand(1<<32)'
set(RODATA_SEED 0xcf361b38)
set(MODEL_SEED 0xaecf305b)
set(PARAMS_SEED 0x7670fe40)
set(MODEL_FORWARD_SEED 0x7997ae0d)
set(PARAMS_FORWARD_SEED 0xb1c47373)
# to build on ubuntu16.04
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)

find_package(PythonInterp 3)
find_package(PythonLibs 3)
include(${PFVM_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib/cmake/protobuf/protobuf-config.cmake)
include(${PFVM_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib/cmake/ONNX/ONNXConfig.cmake)
include(${OBFUSCATOR_INSTALL_PREFIX}/share/cmake/obfuscator/obfuscator.cmake)
find_package(Torch REQUIRED PATHS ${TORCH_DEV_INSTALL_PREFIX}/share/cmake/Torch)
find_package(PFVM REQUIRED PATHS ${PFVM_INSTALL_PREFIX}/share/cmake/pfvm)

add_definitions(-DONNX_ML=1)
add_definitions(-DONNX_NAMESPACE=pfvm_onnx)

add_executable(
  compile_model
  compile_model.cc
  )
target_include_directories(
  compile_model
  PUBLIC
  ${TORCH_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  ${PFVM_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  ${OBFUSCATOR_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  )
target_link_libraries(
  compile_model
  ${TORCH_LIBRARIES}
  ${PFVM_LIBRARIES}
  ${PFVM_RUNTIME_LIBRARIES}
  onnx
  stdc++fs
  )

add_custom_command(
  OUTPUT
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/target.chxvm
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/target.params
  COMMAND env LD_LIBRARY_PATH=${TORCH_DEV_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/compile_model ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/target_onnx/model.onnx target 1
  MAIN_DEPENDENCY target_onnx/model.onnx
  DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/compile_model
  )

embed_encoded_object(target.chxvm ${MODEL_SEED})
embed_encoded_object(target.params ${PARAMS_SEED})

add_custom_command(
  OUTPUT
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/target_forward.chxvm
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/target_forward.params
  COMMAND env LD_LIBRARY_PATH=${TORCH_DEV_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/compile_model ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/target_onnx/model.onnx target_forward 0
  MAIN_DEPENDENCY target_onnx/model.onnx
  DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/compile_model
  )

embed_encoded_object(target_forward.chxvm ${MODEL_FORWARD_SEED})
embed_encoded_object(target_forward.params ${PARAMS_FORWARD_SEED})

add_library(
  infer_dev
  MODULE
  infer.cc
  )
target_compile_definitions(
  infer_dev
  PUBLIC
  -DDEV=1
  )
target_include_directories(
  infer_dev
  PUBLIC
  ${PYTHON_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  ${TORCH_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  ${PFVM_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  ${OBFUSCATOR_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  )
target_link_libraries(
  infer_dev
  ${PFVM_LIBRARIES}
  onnx
  stdc++fs
  )

add_library(
  infer_static
  infer.cc
  target.chxvm.enc.o
  target.params.enc.o
  target_forward.chxvm.enc.o
  target_forward.params.enc.o
  )
target_compile_options(
  infer_static
  PUBLIC
  -fPIC
  )
target_compile_definitions(
  infer_static
  PUBLIC
  MODEL_SEED=${MODEL_SEED}
  PARAMS_SEED=${PARAMS_SEED}
  MODEL_FORWARD_SEED=${MODEL_FORWARD_SEED}
  PARAMS_FORWARD_SEED=${PARAMS_FORWARD_SEED}
  RODATA_SEED=${RODATA_SEED}
  )
target_include_directories(
  infer_static
  PUBLIC
  ${PYTHON_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  ${TORCH_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  ${PFVM_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  ${OBFUSCATOR_INCLUDE_DIRS}
  )
target_link_libraries(
  infer_static
  ${PFVM_RUNTIME_LIBRARIES}
  )
